stemHtml: What is meant by the term "altitude"? The…

options.a: vertical distance of a level or a point measured from the earth`s surface.
options.b: vertical distance of a level or a point measured from mean sea level.
options.c: altimeter indication when the altimeter subscale is set to the current QFE.
options.d: vertical distance of a level or a point measured from the aerodrome reference point.
